title: Initialize Deep Sec Scanner and Install Dependencies

blocker.description: Deep Sec scan initiated but hangs on large monorepo (174 directories, 35+ files discovered in initial pass). Process ran for 7+ minutes with no completion.
attemptedCommands: npx deepsec init (blocked - directory already exists)

nextSteps: Reduce scan scope to specific directories (packages/*, apps/*)

Consider running scan with --fast mode or excluding node_modules more aggressively
